visible_response:
How helpful you were by answering reluctantly when compelled by these men! Now then, you say that I believe in and teach daimonia; so whether they are novel or ancient, at any rate I do believe in daimonia according to your speech... But if I believe in daimonia, then surely there is also a great necessity that I believe 
in daimons. Is this not so?
